purpose: Saudi woman in modest hijab and abaya, casual seated moment with takeaway coffee. Phone-camera aesthetic, real skin texture, candid.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Authentic candid lifestyle photograph of a Saudi woman in her late twenties wearing modest beige or grey hijab with full coverage, loose-fitting black or earth-tone abaya with full sleeves, seated casually at café or home, holding takeaway coffee cup from {brand_descriptor}, natural soft daylight streaming from off-camera window on left, real visible skin texture with subtle pores and natural complexion, candid expression with subtle smile not looking directly at camera, slight motion blur on hand suggesting genuine moment, shot as if from friend's iPhone at eye level with slight grain, focal length 28mm phone camera, modest framing with hands visible naturally holding coffee, warm ambient interior tones, authentic non-staged composition {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: smooth airbrushed skin
Never present non-Saudi talent or generic Middle-Eastern look — Saudi specificity is the point
Avoid tourist-photography aesthetic; this is lived-in lifestyle, not destination shoot
notes: Intents: grow, defend, recover. Source code in research corpus: S01. Saudi adaptation guidance: Default hijab styling contemporary Saudi (modern colored hijab over earth-tone abaya, reads urban professional). For traditional audiences override to all-black abaya. Critical: chain must reject 'glamorous,' 'sexy,' 'fashion model' framings. Reference image: Not required. Recommended frequency: 2-3 per week for female-audience brands. Compliance level: elevated (modest fashion required).
